prompt:
I need to implement a password reset feature. Here are the acceptance criteria:

[+] User can request password reset with registered email
[-] If email is not registered, show generic success message (security)
[+] System sends reset token valid for 1 hour
[+] User can reset password with valid token
[-] Expired tokens are rejected
[-] Used tokens cannot be reused

Help me implement this using TDD with proper test naming and structure.

assertions.name: maps_tests_to_criteria
assertions.description: Each test maps directly to an acceptance criterion

assertions.name: covers_all_criteria
assertions.description: Covers all 6 acceptance criteria with tests
